Class PageData

java.lang.Object
io.github.sentinel.configurations.YAMLData
io.github.sentinel.pages.PageData
public class PageData extends YAMLData
The PageData class is a singleton class that encapsulates page configuration data into a usable java class. It contains getter methods for page urls, and account data based on the given environment or account data based on the given environment and the account map within that environment.

  • Method Details

    • loadYaml

      public static PageData loadYaml(String fileName) throws IOException
      Returns PageData for the given fileName as a string.
      Parameters:
      fileName - String the name of the page configuration file
      Returns:
      PageData the configured PageData
      Throws:
      IOException - if the configuration file cannot be opened or read
      See Also:
      • loadYaml(File)

    • loadYaml

      public static PageData loadYaml(File fileName) throws IOException
      Returns the usable PageData object from the given File object.
      Parameters:
      fileName - File the File object to which the configurations will be mapped.
      Returns:
      PageData the configured PageData
      Throws:
      IOException - if the configuration file cannot be opened or read

    • getElement

      public Map<String,String> getElement(String elementName)
      Returns an element if it exists in a page object.
      Parameters:
      elementName - the name of the element in the page object under the 'elements' section
      Returns:
      Map<String, String> the locators for an element

    • hasUrls

      public boolean hasUrls()
      Returns whether or not the page object contains a urls section.
      Returns:
      true if there is a urls section in the page object, false otherwise

    • containsExecutable

      public boolean containsExecutable(String env)
      Returns whether or not an executable path exists for the given environment in the page object.
      Parameters:
      env - String the environment to check
      Returns:
      boolean true if found, otherwise false

    • getExecutable

      public String getExecutable(String env)
      Returns an executable path based on the environment passed.
      Parameters:
      env - String the environment to check
      Returns:
      String the path to the executable

    • hasExecutables

      public boolean hasExecutables()
      Returns whether or not the page object contains an executables section.
      Returns:
      true if there is an executables section in the page object, false otherwise
